channel.title: AFO Demo Site
channel.description: Agent Feed Optimization — research, demos, and updates on making websites discoverable by AI agents.

item.title: AFO v0.2 Validation Scaffold Complete
item.description: The full v0.2 validation scaffold is built: TEST-001 through TEST-004, measurement rubric aligned to 9 dimensions / 18 points, and review memo with all blockers resolved.

item.title: G-000 AFO Sonar Reader — v0.2 Patch
item.description: G-000 patched with a mandatory URL-First Inspection Protocol. The agent now checks all 7 AFO file endpoints on every URL before responding.

item.title: TEST-001 Redesigned — URL-Focused Comparison Test
item.description: TEST-001 redesigned around a specific URL. Both agents now analyze the same surface, making the delta a clean measure of instruction quality.
